title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has completed a triage of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42: Banned for high-severity spam — phishing links distributed across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner: Banned for high-severity harassment — repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- new_member_17: Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions (formatting/channel rules).
- bot_like_user_77: Warned for suspicious automation — repeated near-identical replies in help channels; account is under review.

**No action taken (2)**
- report_003 (trusted_helper): Closed as a moderation dispute; no policy violation found. Trusted-role members are not sanctioned on single-user accusations without corroborating evidence.
- report_006 (core_maintainer): Closed as a false positive — mass report attributed to brigading following a legitimate moderation decision.

All 6 reports have been closed. If you have concerns about any of these decisions, please contact the moderation team directly.
